article_id: 1. All persons are equal under the law.
text_snippet: 2. No person may be discriminated against on account of race, ethnic origin, language, color, gender, religion, disability, age, political view, or social or economic status or any other improper fact

article_id: 1. Any person born of an Eritrean father or mother is an Eritrean by birth.

article_id: 1. Every person shall have the right to freedom of thought, conscience and belief.
text_snippet: 2. Every person shall have the freedom of speech and expression, including freedom of the press and other media.

article_id: 1. Every person shall have the right to privacy.
text_snippet: 2 a. No person shall be subject to body search, nor shall his premises be entered into or searched or his communications, correspondence, or other property be interfered with, without reasonable cause

article_id: 1. No person may be arrested or detained save pursuant to due process of law.
text_snippet: 2. No person shall be tried or convicted for any act or omission which did not constitute a criminal offense at the time when it was committed. 3. Every person arrested or detained shall be informed o

article_id: 1. The dignity of all persons shall be inviolable.
text_snippet: 2. No person shall be subjected to torture or to cruel, inhuman or degrading treatment or punishment. 3. No person shall be held in slavery or servitude nor shall any person be required to perform for

article_id: 1. There shall be a ministerial Cabinet presided over by the President.
text_snippet: 2. The President may select ministers from among members of the National Assembly or from among persons who are not members of the National Assembly. 3. The Cabinet shall assist the President in: dire

article_id: 2. No person shall be deprived of liberty without due process of law.
2. The National Assembly shall be composed of representatives elected by the people.

text_snippet: 4. The tenure and number of justices of the Supreme Court shall be determined by law. Article 50. Lower Courts The jurisdiction, organization and function of lower courts and the tenure of their judge

article_id: 7. The National Assembly shall have the power to oversee the execution of laws.
